policy: Homepage assembly uses one macro-cycle visual only. The modular Kostolany Egg component is the canonical macro diagram. The older Macro Cycle Board remains available as a state/logic generator but is disabled from homepage rendering to avoid duplicate macro diagrams. Trust Strip is disabled from homepage rendering because trust/source diagnostics are now handled inside the active decision modules rather than as a separate web section.

baseline.description: Create clean operational HTML shell before sections are injected.

sections.name: Market Regime
sections.description: Top market verdict and macro values retained temporarily as a compatibility layer.

sections.name: Market Regime Map
sections.description: Real SPX working chart with OpenClaw action zones and supporting indicators as evidence for the macro cycle board.

sections.name: Cross-Asset Lens
sections.description: SPX, QQQ, TLT, BTC and VIX confirmation lenses that support or contradict the regime map.

sections.name: Asset Allocation Route
sections.description: Cross-asset lens translated into risk budget, add permission, and opportunity promotion rules.

sections.name: Holdings Translation
sections.description: Existing portfolio positions mapped to ruled zones, route permissions, and source authority.

sections.name: Opportunity Queue
sections.description: New ideas allowed only when cycle, route, evidence, asymmetry, and downside control align.

sections.name: Market Tape
sections.description: Temporary compatibility surface. Phase out only after validators and downstream dependencies no longer require it.

sections.name: Trust / Data Quality
sections.description: Disabled from homepage. Trust/source diagnostics are represented inside Holdings, Opportunity Queue, and Market Tape instead of a separate web section.

sections.name: Macro Cycle Board
sections.description: Disabled from homepage to avoid duplicate macro diagram. Logic generation still occurs inside the Kostolany Egg section commands.

sections.name: Kostolany Egg Diagram
sections.description: Canonical macro-cycle visual. This is the only macro diagram rendered on the homepage.

cleanup.description: Remove old/legacy homepage sections and duplicate nav links after operational sections are injected. Cleanup now also treats the older macro-cycle board and Trust Strip as legacy when the canonical decision stack is present.
